audienceSections.normal: In a neutral plan to walk to the park, you will use [[grammar:Мы идём + в + place]]. Use [[grammar:Мы идём в]] before a destination for a current one-way trip on foot. Мы сегодня идём в парк? puts сегодня in a neutral early position. Do not use идём for every kind of repeated or vehicle travel.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter presents [[grammar:Мы идём + в + place]] in a neutral plan to walk to the park. First-person plural идём is the imperfective determinate motion verb. Destination в парк selects accusative, and Мы сегодня идём в парк? has unmarked temporal placement for the planned-today context.

audienceSections.normal: Use [[grammar:Мы идём в]] before a destination for a current one-way trip on foot. Мы сегодня идём в парк? puts сегодня in a neutral early position. Do not use идём for every kind of repeated or vehicle travel.
audienceSections.expert: First-person plural идём is the imperfective determinate motion verb. Destination в парк selects accusative, and Мы сегодня идём в парк? has unmarked temporal placement for the planned-today context.

audienceSections.normal: Keep Cyrillic as the main text. In the reading help, an acute accent marks the stressed vowel; the accent is a study mark and is not normally written in everyday Russian.
audienceSections.expert: The support uses Cyrillic with a single acute accent on the stressed vowel of polysyllabic content words. It introduces no romanization and leaves monosyllables unmarked unless contrast requires it.

breakdown.normal:
Read each exact russian line, then check its natural English meaning. Watch for [[grammar:Мы идём + в + place]] where it appears.

- Мы сегодня идём в парк? — Are we going to the park today?
- Да, идём вместе. — Yes, we are going together.
- Парк рядом с домом. — The park is near the house.
- Потом мы идём в кафе. — Then we are going to a café.
- Хорошо, встретимся в три. — Good, let's meet at three.
- Да, до встречи! — Yes, see you!
breakdown.expert:
These exact reading lines provide the distributional evidence for [[grammar:Мы идём + в + place]]. The grammar section above analyzes the relevant morphology and syntax.

- Мы сегодня идём в парк? — Are we going to the park today?
- Да, идём вместе. — Yes, we are going together.
- Парк рядом с домом. — The park is near the house.
- Потом мы идём в кафе. — Then we are going to a café.
- Хорошо, встретимся в три. — Good, let's meet at three.
- Да, до встречи! — Yes, see you!
